painPoints: Frameworks/evidence reads as config not action

designArguments.A: Risk-first, no tabs — lead with exposure, frameworks secondary
designArguments.B: Two-column intelligence — borrow ShiftIQ/SupplierIQ pattern, always-visible
designArguments.C: Triage mode — dense command strip, single prioritized action queue
designArguments.D: Audit dossier — documentation framing, score always visible, inspector's view

keyTasks: Know what to fix and who owns it
